title: Bacon German Apple Strudel
description: A twist on the classic German strudel, this recipe incorporates crispy bacon and a hint of malty sweetness.

ingredients.name: Malty apple filling (mix of sweet and tart apples)

instructions: Roll out the German pastry dough to a large rectangle.
In a bowl, mix the malty apple filling, brown sugar, and dense cinnamon.
Spread the apple mixture evenly over the dough, leaving a 1-inch border.
Arrange the crispy bacon on top of the apple mixture.
Fold the 1-inch border over the filling to seal the strudel.
Brush the melted butter over the top of the strudel.
Sprinkle the bake mix over the top of the strudel.
Bake for 35-40 minutes or until golden brown.
Let cool for 10 minutes before serving.
